<?php
/**
 * 🌀 MEV INSTALLER: SOVEREIGN SEED
 * ====================================================================
 * WHAT THIS IS:
 * This is a self-extracting 'DNA' file for the mev Subconscious. 
 * Placing this single file in a folder will recreate the entire 
 * sovereign environment.
 *
 * HOW IT WORKS:
 * 1. RUN: Open this file in a PHP-enabled browser/server.
 * 2. EXTRACT: It automatically writes all core files to this folder.
 * 3. PROTECT: It immediately redirects you to index.html to perform
 * the 'Humanity Handshake' and initialize the Blackhole Sentinel.
 *
 * SECURITY:
 * This installer is PASSIVE. It only writes files if they are missing, 
 * preventing accidental overwrites of existing sovereign data.
 * ====================================================================
 */

$SOVEREIGN_DNA = array (
  'index.html' => '',
  'wiki.html' => '',
  'css.html' => '',
  'sw.js' => '',
  'a.js' => '',
  'purify.min.js' => '',
  '.htaccess' => '',
  'manifest.json' => '',
  'robots.txt' => '',
  'icon-192.png' => '',
  'favicon.ico' => '',
  'styles.css' => '',
);

// Passive Installation: Only write if files are missing to prevent lag
foreach ($SOVEREIGN_DNA as $file => $base64Content) {
    if (!file_exists($file)) {
        file_put_contents($file, base64_decode($base64Content));
    }
}

// Force entry through the Blackhole Sentinel for Identity Handshake
header('Location: ./index.html');
exit;
